message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6FF
  ActorBorderColor #666666
  ActorBackgroundColor #E6E6FF
  ArrowColor #000000
}

actor "ユーザ" as U
boundary "ブラウザ" as B
control "web.php" as W
control "PersonController" as C
entity "Person" as P
boundary "person.find.blade" as V

U -> B : 該当ページをリクエスト[person/find]
B -> W : GET[person/find]
W -> C : @find
C -> V

U -> V : findボタン押下
V -> W : POST
W -> C : @search
C -> P : find()
P --> C
C -> V
V -> P : getData()
P --> V

@enduml
```
